prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科组（含理科/物理类）最低位次分别为5865名→6875名→5568名→8139名→7511名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约1943名；2025年基准位次约7511名；该校在河南省理科组招生计划：2021年98人→2022年90人→2023年89人→2024年91人→2025年87人（物理类），整体呈小幅缩减趋势；2026年物理类计划大幅扩至162人，较2025年增加75人（增幅约86%），为近年最大规模扩招，显著加剧省内竞争。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华南理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第32名，近年排名稳定在25-32名区间，属于国内顶尖工科院校梯队；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为明显负面，主要因校园偷拍事件引发34条负面舆情，学校处理方式引发社会争议，可能对考生报考意愿产生一定抑制效应；抖音热度排名第87（一般），短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；轻工技术与工程A+（全国顶尖）、化学工程与技术A、材料科学与工程A、环境科学与工程A、食品科学与工程A、建筑学A-、控制科学与工程A-、机械工程A-、管理科学与工程A-，共9个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等华南理工大学优势相关专业大类持续高热推荐，对高分考生吸引力强；土木建筑、生化环材等专业明显劝退；河南省2026年普通高考总人数约120万（较2025年约90.7万大幅增加），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；华南理工大学位于广东省广州市，属跨省招生；该校在河南省招生占比近年约4%-7%（2025年总招生约238人，河南占比约6.6%），河南为其重要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次7511名、2026年物理类大幅扩招86%（计划从87人增至162人）导致竞争加剧（位次数字应增大），以及声誉负面事件可能小幅抑制报考热度（位次数字略收窄），预测2026年理科组最低位次约11196名，区间10696-11696名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (including Science/Physics Category) were 5865 → 6875 → 5568 → 8139 → 7511, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of approximately 1943 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 7511; the university's enrollment plan for the Science Group in Henan Province: 98 in 2021 → 90 in 2022 → 89 in 2023 → 91 in 2024 → 87 in 2025 (Physics Category), showing a slight reduction trend; in 2026, the Physics Category plan significantly expands to 162, an increase of 75 (approximately 86%) compared to 2025, marking the largest expansion in recent years, significantly intensifying competition within the province.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 32nd in the 2026 main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking range of 25-32 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier engineering university tier; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to 34 negative public opinions triggered by a campus peeping incident, and the school's handling method has sparked social controversy, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 87 (average), with moderately low exposure on short video platforms; Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+ (national top), Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 9 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other advantageous related major categories of South China University of Technology continue to be highly recommended, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; majors such as Civil Engineering and Architecture, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is approximately 1.2 million (significantly increased from approximately 907,000 in 2025), and the expansion of the candidate scale intensifies overall competition; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment proportion in Henan Province in recent years is about 4%-7% (total enrollment in 2025 is about 238, with Henan accounting for about 6.6%), making Henan one of its important source provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 7511, the significant expansion of Physics Category in 2026 by 86% (plan from 87 to 162) leading to intensified competition (ranking number should increase), and the negative reputation event possibly slightly suppressing application enthusiasm (ranking number slightly narrows), the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 Science Group is approximately 11196, with a range of 10696-11696.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Academician Featured Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category significantly expands to 162, and the ranking is expected to shift backward to approximately 11196. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the range of 10696-11696 mainly fill in Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors (AI Top Class, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors (Software Engineering, Mathematics, Big Data, etc.) as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<10696) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the liberal arts group (including liberal arts/history category) were 1708 → 1853 → 1676 → 3514 → 1923, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2024, there was an abnormal large backward shift due to exam mode adjustments, and in 2025 it recovered to 1923; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1923. The university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Henan Province: 2021: 23 → 2022: 23 → 2023: 21 → 2024: 21 → 2025: 23 (history category), overall basically stable; the 2026 history category plan increases to 26, an increase of 3 from 2025 (about 13%), a slight expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: South China University of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 32nd on the main list, with recent rankings stable in the 25-32 range, belonging to the top tier of domestic engineering universities; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly due to a campus peeping incident that triggered 34 negative public opinions, and the school's handling method sparked social controversy, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 87th (average), with moderately low exposure on short video platforms; its strong disciplines include Light Industry Technology and Engineering A+, Chemical Engineering and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, Food Science and Engineering A, Architecture A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, while the liberal arts group enrollment majors (Economics, Law, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, etc.) have relatively low correlation with its advantageous engineering fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law majors have socially recommended popularity (slightly hot), Economics majors are divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication majors are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Henan Province general college entrance examination is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from about 907,000 in 2025), and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition; South China University of Technology is located in Guangzhou City, Guangdong Province, and is a cross-province enrollment; its enrollment proportion in Henan Province in recent years is about 4%-7%, making Henan one of its important source provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1923, the slight expansion of the history category in 2026 by 13% (plan from 23 to 26) leading to slightly intensified competition, and the negative reputation event possibly slightly suppressing application enthusiasm, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 liberal arts group is approximately 2044, with a range of 1737-2351.
